rows.label: tlk70000071_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Your posse's really been helping
out around here, hasn't it?

rows.label: tlk70000071_04_msg0002
rows.name:
I knew that you lot were something
a bit out of the ordinary.

rows.label: tlk70000071_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Iira may preach "coexistence
of people and Blades," but none
embody it quite like you.

rows.label: tlk70000071_04_msg0004
rows.name:
The world needs to know how things
should be between Blades and people.
Please, keep on showing us the way...
